# joshferrara.com

> Personal website of Josh Ferrara — product strategist, dad, musician, reader, photographer.

This site aggregates both hand-authored content (essays, notes, projects) and externally-sourced content (tweets, music, movies, books, podcasts) into a unified personal hub.

## Content

- Writing: /writing/ — Blog posts, essays, long-form pieces (2012–present)
- Notes: /notes/ — Loose ideas, learning in public
- Projects: /projects/ — Side projects and tools
- Talks: /talks/ — Presentations and talks
- Travel: /travel/ — City guides with recommendations
- Guides: /guides/ — How-to and reference content
- Favorites: /favorites/ — Curated recommendation lists
- Tweets: /tweets/ — Twitter archive (2007–2017, 6800+ tweets)
- Listening: /listening/ — Music listening history via Last.fm
- Watching: /watching/ — Film diary via Letterboxd
- Library: /library/ — Books read and want to read
- Podcasts: /podcasts/ — Podcast episodes
- Annual Recaps: /recaps/ — Year-in-review posts
- Archive: /archive/ — College-era blog posts (2006–2012)

## About

- About: /about/
- Now: /now/ — What Josh is currently up to
- Colophon: /colophon/ — How the site is built

## Feeds

- RSS: /feed.xml
- Sitemap: /sitemap-index.xml

## Technical

Built with Astro, hosted on Cloudflare Workers. Content authored in MDX.
